description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image with a cache of the node_modules/ directory. Define two stages, test and deploy, and include three test jobs (test:mocha, test:tslint, and pack) that run in the test stage. Each test job runs a before_script that sets unsafe-perm true and installs dependencies via yarn, then executes yarn run $CI_BUILD_NAME for the mocha and tslint jobs, while the pack job runs a before_script with the same commands followed by a script that sets a prerelease suffix based on branch or tag, updates package.json with sed, checks the version change, compiles with yarn run compile, and creates an npm package with npm pack, publishing the resulting *.tgz as a one‑day artifact. Add two deploy jobs (deploy:npm-dev and deploy:npm-latest) in the deploy stage that depend on the pack job, write the npm authentication token to ~/.npmrc, and run npm publish --ignore-scripts with the tag variable set to dev for the develop branch or latest for tag builds, each using the npm-registry runner tag and targeting the dev or latest environment respectively. Configure the dev deployment to run only on the develop branch of janslow/gitlab-ci-variables and the latest deployment to run only on tags, and set NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=warn for all test jobs.
